name: createSharedHook
description: One shared instance of the hook globally. First subscriber's args are used; when subscribers hit zero, the runner unmounts.
examples: const useSharedMediaQuery = createSharedHook(useMediaQuery); const matches = useSharedMediaQuery("(max-width: 768px)");
warning: For complex interfaces, we strongly recommend using state management solutions outside of React like createStore, reatom, effector, or zustand instead of context

parameters.name: useHook
parameters.description: - The hook to create a shared instance of

source.source: * @param {Hook} useHook - The hook to create a shared instance of

tokens.name: useHook
tokens.description: - The hook to create a shared instance of

source.source: * @returns {Hook & { useShared: typeof useShared }} - The shared hook
